steps.title: Locate the direct evidence in the passage
steps.content:
The passage states: El Museo del Barrio “is located in New York City and has more than 8,500 objects in its collection” and was “Founded in 1969.” Compare each choice to these facts.
  • Choice A — 'It is no longer located in New York City.': The text says it is located in New York City, so this is directly contradicted. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Its collection includes over 8,500 objects.': “More than 8,500 objects” means the same as “over 8,500 objects.” This is an exact match to the text. ✓
  • Choice C — 'It was founded after 2000.': The text says it was founded in 1969, well before 2000. Directly contradicted. ✗
  • Choice D — 'It is visited by more people than any other Latino cultural institution in the US.': The text never mentions visitor numbers or compares the museum to others by attendance. ✗

steps.title: Confirm the match
steps.content:
Choice B rephrases the passage’s “more than 8,500 objects” as “over 8,500 objects” — a direct, supported statement with no distortion.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
